protocol.atomic_append_guidance: append-only JSONL; one complete JSON object per line; O_APPEND; never rewrite/truncate/sort/compact; readers tolerate absent files and malformed trailing lines; stable item_id values required

findings.event_name_compliance: All parsed records match expected ledger event values: proposal, peer_review, improvement, consensus, broadcast.
findings.confidence_values: All confidence values are numeric and within [0,1].
findings.timestamp_format: All ts values match ISO-8601 UTC/Z or offset form; precision varies between seconds and fractional seconds, which is still consistent ISO-8601.
findings.line_integrity: All five ledgers contain only parseable JSON objects; no blank, malformed, or partial lines were found. Each file ends with a newline.

pattern_gaps: commander identity is encoded inconsistently: c001, 003, 005, and commander-004 forms coexist
reviews use both rev-* and review-* prefixes
consensus uses both cons-* and con-* prefixes
some based_on values point to artifact filenames rather than ledger item_ids, weakening automated graph traversal

findings.existing_atom_context: atm-001/003/004/005 were read; atm-002 was not present under commander-002. New delta: all 11 current review records, not just the first 3, omit evidence; newer consensus and broadcast records also omit evidence. No malformed/event/confidence/ts failures were found.

gaps: Protocol required_fields are not enforced by writers: 13 of 31 current events omit required evidence.
Extra per-ledger fields are useful but undocumented, so target_item_id, based_on, consensus_item_id, verdict, and adopted_items remain optional/ad hoc.
Item_id naming is unique but not normalized across commanders or ledgers, which makes stable machine references harder.
Some based_on references name external squad artifact files; if intended, they should be source_refs or a separate artifact_refs field rather than item graph references.
No adoption ledger exists despite adopt being in commander_workflow; adoption proof remains outside the collaboration bus.
evidence: collab/protocol.json required_fields lines 48-58 and workflow lines 37-46
reviews.jsonl: 11/11 valid and event=peer_review, but all 11 miss required evidence
consensus.jsonl: 5/5 valid and event=consensus; cons-005-synthesis-readiness misses evidence
broadcasts.jsonl: 3/3 valid and event=broadcast; bcast-003-findings misses evidence
Parser check found 31 total item_ids, 0 duplicates, 0 malformed lines, 0 out-of-range confidence values, 0 non-ISO ts values
